analysis.elliott_wave: BTC is likely in a 5th wave of the current impulse wave, with a potential reversal pending at the end of the wave.
analysis.momentum: The overbought RSI reading suggests a potential reversal, but the 4.11% 24h gain indicates ongoing bullish momentum.
analysis.trade_plan: Buy on dips to $66,000.00, targeting $72,000.00. Set stop-loss at $65,000.00.
analysis.risk_note: A potential reversal could occur if the price fails to hold above $66,000.00 support.
